title: Apple Breaks Precedent, Patches DarkSword for iOS 18

title: Blast Radius of TeamPCP Attacks Expands Amid Hacker Infighting
summary: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.

sections.overview: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.

sections.impact: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.
sections.mitigation: Affected users should rotate credentials, enable MFA, and monitor accounts for suspicious activity.
sections.context: Data breaches carry significant regulatory, financial, and reputational consequences. Affected organizations and individuals should monitor for follow-on attacks using exposed data.

email_summary: As organizations disclose breaches tied to TeamPCP's supply chain attacks, ShinyHunters and Lapsus$ are getting involved, taking credit, and creating a murky situation for enterprises.

title: Picking Up 'Skull Vibrations'? Could Be XR Headset Authentication
summary: "Skull vibration harmonics generated by vital signs" can be used to sign in to VR, AR, and MR headsets, according to emerging research.

sections.overview: "Skull vibration harmonics generated by vital signs" can be used to sign in to VR, AR, and MR headsets, according to emerging research.
sections.technical: This involves malicious software designed to compromise, exfiltrate, or disrupt targeted systems.
sections.impact: Impact assessment details are available in the full source article.
sections.mitigation: Review endpoint detection rules and update threat intelligence feeds. Scan for known indicators of compromise.
sections.context: Modern malware campaigns frequently use multi-stage delivery chains and evasion techniques. Defense-in-depth strategies including EDR, network monitoring, and application allowlisting help reduce exposure.

email_summary: "Skull vibration harmonics generated by vital signs" can be used to sign in to VR, AR, and MR headsets, according to emerging research.
